channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: New & Notable: The French-born, London-based producer blends…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: New & Notable: The French-born, London-based producer blends Afrobeat, Highlife, spiritual jazz, and electronic music into vibrant, borderless jams.
item.content:encoded: New & Notable: The French-born, London-based producer blends Afrobeat, Highlife, spiritual jazz, and electronic music into vibrant, borderless jams.

item.title: The Legend of Cynthia Plaster Caster She was famous for her…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
The Legend of Cynthia Plaster Caster

She was famous for her statues of rock stars’ penises, but this groupie’s entire story has never been told — until now.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
The Legend of Cynthia Plaster Caster

She was famous for her statues of rock stars’ penises, but this groupie’s entire story has never been told — until now.

item.title: New & Notable: The Milanese darkwave artist plays to the dan…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: New & Notable: The Milanese darkwave artist plays to the dancefloor on this synth-led effort. nodding to industrial, post-punk, and black metal throughout.
item.content:encoded: New & Notable: The Milanese darkwave artist plays to the dancefloor on this synth-led effort. nodding to industrial, post-punk, and black metal throughout.

item.title: Album of the Day: 2K88, Lauren Duffus, Rainy Miller & Bianca…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Album of the Day: 2K88, Lauren Duffus, Rainy Miller & Bianca Scout, "Everything Always Changes, For We're Truly Here." Four musicians working across ambient, rap, R&B, and pop create an array of cinematic, slow-burning soundscapes.
item.content:encoded: Album of the Day: 2K88, Lauren Duffus, Rainy Miller & Bianca Scout, "Everything Always Changes, For We're Truly Here." Four musicians working across ambient, rap, R&B, and pop create an array of cinematic, slow-burning soundscapes.

item.title: “There is one collaboration on the album,” Charli XCX told ‘…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:

item.content:encoded:

item.title: Jazz musicians are often called poets, but they rarely appea…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Jazz musicians are often called poets, but they rarely appear in poetry. Pianist Mal Waldron did, immortalized in Frank O'Hara's The Day Lady Died. His remarkable story extends far beyond that final line.
item.content:encoded: Jazz musicians are often called poets, but they rarely appear in poetry. Pianist Mal Waldron did, immortalized in Frank O'Hara's The Day Lady Died. His remarkable story extends far beyond that final line.

item.title: From DIY warehouses to stages around the world, Oliver Acker…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: From DIY warehouses to stages around the world, Oliver Ackermann has never stopped pushing the limits of sound. Read our latest Underground Medicine interview with the A Place to Bury Strangers and Death By Audio mastermind.
item.content:encoded: From DIY warehouses to stages around the world, Oliver Ackermann has never stopped pushing the limits of sound. Read our latest Underground Medicine interview with the A Place to Bury Strangers and Death By Audio mastermind.

item.title: "We dressed like crab fishermen, and then Bradford Cox was d…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: "We dressed like crab fishermen, and then Bradford Cox was dressed as Joey Ramone playing an Akai quarter-inch tape reel machine that we had found on the street," MGMT’s Andrew VanWyngarden later told Stereogum. "It was actually the one that's all over 'Oracular Spectacular.'"
item.content:encoded: "We dressed like crab fishermen, and then Bradford Cox was dressed as Joey Ramone playing an Akai quarter-inch tape reel machine that we had found on the street," MGMT’s Andrew VanWyngarden later told Stereogum. "It was actually the one that's all over 'Oracular Spectacular.'"

item.title: Remembering Syd Barrett, who passed away 20 years ago today……
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Remembering Syd Barrett, who passed away 20 years ago today…

Here are MGMT covering "Lucifer Sam" during Pink Floyd Week on 'Late Night' in 2011.
item.content:encoded:
Remembering Syd Barrett, who passed away 20 years ago today…

The 84-year-old Kentucky Republican has been in the hospital for weeks. No one can say why.

item.title: ⋆┈ イベントレポ（写真8枚） ┈⋆ 内田有紀とtimelesz寺西拓人 「ラストノート」オファーを受け それ…

item.title: Egypt was leading late, up 2-0. The Argentinians looked beat…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Egypt was leading late, up 2-0. The Argentinians looked beaten. But they fought and fought and fought. Scoring one goal, then another to equalize. And, finally, a third to advance to the quarterfinal. n.pr/4p9cJAI
item.content:encoded: Egypt was leading late, up 2-0. The Argentinians looked beaten. But they fought and fought and fought. Scoring one goal, then another to equalize. And, finally, a third to advance to the quarterfinal. n.pr/4p9cJAI

item.title: Grammy-winning Mexican singer-songwriter Julieta Venegas has…
item.author: Discogs (@discogsofficial.bsky.social)
item.description: Grammy-winning Mexican singer-songwriter Julieta Venegas has spent nearly three decades reinventing herself, from her alt-rock beginnings to the Grammy-winning "Limón y Sal" to her 2026 album "Norteña." Explore the records that shaped her on this journey: https://youtu.be/POqeCVaK0AI
item.content:encoded: Grammy-winning Mexican singer-songwriter Julieta Venegas has spent nearly three decades reinventing herself, from her alt-rock beginnings to the Grammy-winning "Limón y Sal" to her 2026 album "Norteña." Explore the records that shaped her on this journey: https://youtu.be/POqeCVaK0AI

item.content:encoded: Egypt was leading late, up 2-0. The Argentinians looked beaten. But they fought and fought and fought. Scoring one goal, then another to equalize. And, finally, a third to advance to the quarterfinal. n.pr/4vBTaTn

item.title: The International Olympic Committee advised sports bodies to…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The International Olympic Committee advised sports bodies to end a three-year program vetting Russians for neutral status ahead of qualifying events for the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics. n.pr/4gmWJZz
item.content:encoded: The International Olympic Committee advised sports bodies to end a three-year program vetting Russians for neutral status ahead of qualifying events for the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics. n.pr/4gmWJZz

item.title: Cynthia Albritton and her groupie collective, known as The P…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Cynthia Albritton and her groupie collective, known as The Plaster Casters of Chicago, immortalized the penises of several rock stars — including Jimi Hendrix.

“He actually enjoyed it,” Albritton wrote in her notes from the session with Hendrix.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
Cynthia Albritton and her groupie collective, known as The Plaster Casters of Chicago, immortalized the penises of several rock stars — including Jimi Hendrix.

“He actually enjoyed it,” Albritton wrote in her notes from the session with Hendrix.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: Kelela's 'new avatar' is our Album Of The Week. Read the re…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Kelela's 'new avatar' is our Album Of The Week.

Read the review and check out a comprehensive list of this week's new albums:
item.content:encoded:
Kelela's 'new avatar' is our Album Of The Week.

Read the review and check out a comprehensive list of this week's new albums:
